name: imessage-fixed
description: Read-only iMessage reader that reads BOTH sides of a conversation — the stock reader silently drops ~95% of the messages you send. Also fixes short-code handles and attributedBody decoding, surfaces Apple Cash / payment messages, and adds thread enumeration, named-chat reads, and attachments. Stdlib-only, schema-aware, tested.

tools.name: imsg_read_thread
tools.description: Read a thread by phone number or short code.

tools.name: imsg_recent
tools.description: Recent messages across all senders, read-state-independent.

tools.name: imsg_list_threads
tools.description: Enumerate recent conversations with counts and latest message.

tools.name: imsg_read_chat
tools.description: Read a named group chat or contact conversation.
